sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong pai meng in Emmanuel, honkhia in saltang Israel;
Pasian Tapa kilat ngak mi, nilkhiat thuak

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nuam un, nuam un, no Israel,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong pai meng in Jessi suan aw, Satan khut pan honkhia meng aw
sung pan honkhia ta in, Sihna tungah gualzo sak in;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong pai meng in zingkhua vak aw, Ka
Zankhuamialpi hawlkhia ta in, Meii pai letin khuavak sak

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: David tawhtang hong pai meng in, Vantung kongpi hong honsak in;
hong kha aw, Siatna lampi khaktan ta aw.
